title: crotalaria grevei
intro: Crotalaria grevei is a plant species in the legume family, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria grevei include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to relieve pain and reduce swelling. In addition, the plant is also used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
